news.headline: TEN Holdings, Inc. closes IPO for 1,667,000 shares, raises capital, and enters Nasdaq as XHLD.
news.summary: In Langhorne, Pennsylvania, on February 18, 2025, TEN Holdings, Inc. (known as "XHLD") and listed on Nasdaq as XHLD, a company offering event planning, production, and broadcasting services, declared the completion of its initial public offering. This offering consisted of a total of 1,667,000 shares.

news.headline: Martin's Potato Rolls partners with Hyak Motorsports for Ambetter Health 400 at Atlanta Motor Speedway on Feb. 23, 2025.
news.summary: In Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, on February 18, 2025, Martin's® Famous Potato Rolls and Bread revealed their collaboration with Hyak Motorsports for the Ambetter Health 400 at Atlanta Motor Speedway on February 23, 2025. The renowned brand will be the primary sponsor for the event.

news.headline: Toll Brothers (NYSE:TOL) Q1 results disappoint: Quarterly earnings $1.75/share miss estimate $2.04, revenue $1.85B missed $1.9B.
news.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) released its first-quarter results post Tuesday's market close. The report indicated quarterly earnings of $1.75 per share, falling short of the expected analyst consensus of $2.04. Quarterly revenue stood at $1.85 billion, missing the anticipated $1.9 billion, and marking a decline from the previous year's revenue of $1.94 billion. Home sales revenues totaled $1.84 billion, showing a 5% decrease compared to the previous year, while the number of delivered homes was 1,991. For further details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sturm, Ruger & Co. (NYSE-RGR) to report 2024 results on Feb 19, file Form 10-K. Webcast on Feb 20 at 9am ET to discuss results.
news.summary: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE-RGR) is set to release its Annual Report on Form 10-K on Wednesday, February 19, 2025, after the stock market closes. Following this, on Thursday, February 20, 2025, the company will conduct a webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET to analyze the operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The webcast can be accessed through a provided link or by visiting Ruger.com/corporate. Participants interested in posing questions during the webcast will need to access the platform before its commencement.

news.headline: HP Inc. (HPQ) acquires key AI capabilities from Humane, including Cosmos platform, 300+ patents, aiming to transform future work.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, HP Inc. revealed that it has finalized a deal to purchase essential AI abilities from Humane. This acquisition includes Humane's AI-driven platform, Cosmos, a proficient technical team, and a portfolio comprising over 300 patents and patent applications. The agreement, valued on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HPQ, signifies a strategic move for HP in its progression towards becoming a more customer-focused organization.

news.headline: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. will release 2024 Q4 & year-end results on Feb 24, 2025, and host conference call at 9:00 am MT.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 18, 2025, Gran Tierra Energy Inc. is set to disclose its financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024, on Monday, February 24, 2025, prior to the market opening. Shareholders can anticipate the conference call on the same day at 9:00 a.m. MT, 11:00 a.m. ET, and 4:00 p.m. GMT. Gran Tierra is listed as (NYSE American:GTE), (TSX:GTE), and (LSE:GTE).

news.headline: Milei’s venture into memecoins sheds light on Solana's challenges; a 'Hellscape'. - Source: Bloomberg
Dow Jones improves after U.S.-Russia talks, Warren Buffet invests in new stock. Intel and Nvidia rise, while Meta falls.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones saw a slight increase on the stock market following discussions between the United States and Russia. A new stock in Warren Buffett's portfolio experienced significant growth. Nvidia experienced a rise in value, while Meta saw a decline. Additionally, Intel saw a notable increase based on positive expectations. The overall trend in the market was positive, with specific stocks making notable moves. This news was covered in a live broadcast by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: S&P 500 reaches record high despite Meta, Amazon dropping; Axon Enterprise breaks out. Markets resilient.
news.summary: The S&P 500 reached a record high, driven by growth, while major companies like Meta Platforms and Amazon saw declines. Axon Enterprise stood out with a breakout. The Dow Jones Futures also showed positivity, indicating the S&P 500's strong performance despite the setbacks faced by Meta and Amazon. This news was highlighted in a recent article from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties reports 2024 financial results; (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL); Figures in USD.
news.summary: Sandstorm Gold Ltd., also known as Sandstorm Gold Royalties, recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The report encompasses a comprehensive overview of the company's performance during this period. The financial figures presented are denoted in U.S. dollars, unless specified otherwise. Additionally, the company's trading symbols on the New York Stock Exchange and Toronto Stock Exchange are SAND and SSL, respectively. These details were made public from the company's headquarters in Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Roku partners with Bassmaster for free live coverage of fishing tournaments, becoming streaming hub.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, on February 18, 2025, a new streaming rights partnership has been announced between Roku, the top TV streaming platform in America, and Bassmaster, the premier professional bass fishing tournament. This collaboration will allow audiences to enjoy free live coverage of Bassmaster tournaments. Roku, as America's leading TV streaming service, will bring this exclusive content to viewers, further solidifying its position in the industry. This partnership is set to provide unparalleled access to Bassmaster's tournaments, enhancing the viewing experience for fishing enthusiasts.

news.headline: Safe Bulkers, Inc. reports Q4 and full-year 2024 results, declares $0.05 dividend per share on common stock.
news.summary: In Monaco on February 18, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the periods concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as SB, specializes in global marine drybulk transportation. Alongside the results, the company's Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.05 per share for all outstanding common stock.

news.headline: AWH to hold Q4 2024 earnings call on March 12, 2025, at 5:00 PM ET. Company listed on CSE: AAWH-U.CN and OTCQX: AAWH.
news.summary: Ascend Wellness Holdings, Inc. ("AWH"), a leading cannabis operator, is set to host a conference call on March 12, 2025, at 5:00 PM ET. The company trades under the tickers CSE: AAWH-U.CN and OTCQX: AAWH. This announcement was made today, February 18, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: AES named top seller of clean energy to corporations globally in 2024, marking third consecutive year. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: For the third year in a row, AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has maintained its position as the leading seller of clean energy to businesses worldwide in 2024. The ranking was determined by BloombergNEF's Corporate Energy Market Outlook. This signifies the company's continuous success in providing clean energy solutions, emphasizing its strong presence and influence in the market. The consistency in performance showcases AES Corporation's dedication to sustainable energy practices, demonstrating its commitment to environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Saronic secures $600M in Series C funding to build autonomous ships at Port Alpha shipyard.
news.summary: A cutting-edge shipyard named Port Alpha will be launched by Saronic in Austin, Texas. This facility is specifically equipped to construct autonomous ships for the hybrid fleet. Saronic Technologies revealed the closure of a substantial $600 million funding for its Series C round on February 18, 2025. This funding boost is intended to propel the company's objective of revolutionizing shipbuilding in the autonomous sector.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals surpasses 2024 production goal with over 633,000 gold equivalent ounces. Expects 40% growth in 5 years.
news.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. has announced that its 2024 actual production surpassed expectations, totaling more than 633,000 gold equivalent ounces ("GEOs"). This exceeds the upper end of the 2024 production guidance and showcases the Company's strong operational performance. Wheaton is traded on the TSX, NYSE, and LSE under the ticker symbol WPM. The company is based in Vancouver, BC.

news.headline: Icahn Enterprises L.P. will review Q4 2024 earnings on webcast at 10:00 a.m. ET on Feb 26, 2025. Visit provided link.
news.summary: Icahn Enterprises L.P. revealed plans to review its Q4 2024 performance through a webcast on February 26, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The event will be accessible via a link provided by the company. This announcement was made in Sunny Isles Beach, Florida, on February 18, 2025. Icahn Enterprises is listed on Nasdaq as IEP.

news.headline: Alamos Gold Sees Growth in Gold Reserves in 2024
Occidental Petroleum (NYSE: OXY) Q4 EPS beats at 80 cents, revenues miss at $6.83 billion, down from $7.52 billion. Shares slide post results.
news.summary: Oil and gas company Occidental Petroleum Corp. (NYSE:OXY) released its fourth-quarter financial results following the closing bell on Tuesday. The company reported earnings of 80 cents per share, surpassing the anticipated 70 cents per share and marking a rise from the previous year's earnings of 74 cents per share. Despite this positive earnings report, quarterly revenue fell short of expectations at $6.83 billion, missing the projected $7.05 billion. Additionally, this figure represents a decline from the $7.52 billion in revenue reported for the same period in the previous year. These results highlight the company's mixed performance in key financial metrics.

news.headline: Colgate-Palmolive Co. to acquire Prime100 for entry into fast-growing fresh pet food market, complementing existing offerings.
news.summary: In efforts to expand its market reach and focus on high-growth product segments, Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) revealed its latest strategic move. The company disclosed its plan to purchase Care TopCo Pty Ltd, the entity behind the Prime100 pet food brand. This acquisition grants Colgate-Palmolive’s Hill’s Pet Nutrition division an opportunity to tap into the swiftly expanding fresh pet food sector. By integrating the Prime100 brand, known for its science-based approach and strong support from veterinarians, the company aims to bolster its presence in the pet food market.

news.headline: Quad/Graphics, Inc. reports Q4 and full-year 2024 results:- Net Debt Leverage reduced to 1.6x- Quarterly Dividend increased by 50% to $0.075 per share- Net Sales $2.7 billion in 2024- Net Loss $51 million in 2024- 2025 guidance includes Net Debt Leverage target of about 1.5x.
news.summary: Quad/Graphics, Inc. reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. They recorded net sales of $2.7 billion in 2024, down from $3.0 billion in 2023. Net loss for 2024 was $51 million compared to $55 million in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was $224 million in 2024, down from $234 million in 2023. The company reduced net debt to $350 million, achieving a net debt leverage of 1.6x. They also increased the quarterly dividend by 50% to $0.075 per share and introduced 2025 guidance, projecting a debt leverage ratio of approximately 1.5x. Additionally, the company highlighted their focus on revenue diversification, strategic investments in data capabilities, and market positioning for future growth. Quad aims to drive revenue through its MX Solutions Suite and innovative offerings like At-Home Connect and In-Store Connect.

news.headline: ATS will attend J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 11, 2025, with CEO and CFO participating in a fireside chat at 9:45 a.m. Webcast available on the Investor Relations site.
news.summary: ATS Corporation (ATS) shared that CEO Andrew Hider and CFO Ryan McLeod are set to take part in the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in New York City on March 11, 2025. The event will feature a fireside chat at 09:45 a.m. Eastern Time. For those interested, a webcast link to the live event can be accessed through the Investor Relations site at https://investors.atsautomation.com/ The company's stock code is TSX and NYSE: ATS.

news.headline: Alamos Gold's mineral reserves rise by 31%, with Island Gold reserves up by 32% at 11% higher grades.
news.summary: The latest report indicates a substantial 31% boost in global mineral reserves, primarily attributed to the inclusion of Magino. Additionally, there has been a remarkable 32% rise in mineral reserves at Island Gold with a notable improvement of 11% in grades. These developments underscore a positive trend in the mineral reserves sector, demonstrating significant growth and improvement in key figures.

news.headline: Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) to hold a conference call on Feb. 26, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. ET to discuss Q4 results. Released after market close on Feb. 25, 2025.
news.summary: Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) has announced that they will be hosting a conference call and live audio webcast on Wednesday, February 26, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. (ET) to review the financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. The official financial results will be disclosed on Tuesday, February 25, 2025, after the markets conclude. Stakeholders are encouraged to join in the call led by company executives, with an opportunity for analysts to ask questions following the presentation.

news.headline: Mandalay Resources to release Q4 & year-end 2024 financial results on Feb 20, 2025 followed by conference call on Feb 21 at 10:00 AM (Toronto time).
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Mandalay Resources Corporation (TSX: MND, OTCQB: MNDJF) shared plans to unveil its fourth quarter and full-year financial outcomes for 2024 after markets close on February 20. This will be followed by a conference call and webcast scheduled for February 21, 2025, at 10:00 AM (Toronto time), directed towards investors and analysts.

news.headline: Interfield Global Software Inc. to move to Canadian Securities Exchange; Common Shares to be listed, others delisted.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2025, Interfield Global Software Inc. (trading as CBOE CA: IFSS) disclosed updates on its strategic alternatives review. The company's board of directors greenlit a plan for the listing of its common shares on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) and the subsequent delisting from the Cboe Canada Exchange (Cboe Canada). This move marks a pivotal transition for the company's stocks, signifying a shift in its trading platform and potentially impacting investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Embecta Corp. to attend J.P. Morgan Global Leveraged Finance Conf. Chief Financial Officer to present on Feb 25, 2025 at 3:00 p.m. ET #EMBC
news.summary: In PARSIPPANY, N.J., on Feb. 18, 2025, Embecta Corp. disclosed that Jake Elguicze, their Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to speak at the J.P. Morgan Global Leveraged Finance Conference in Miami on February 25, 2025, at 3:00 p.m. ET. The company, trading as Nasdaq: EMBC, will be participating in this important event.

news.headline: Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta reports Q4 2024 earnings results in Mexico City, prepared under IFRS standards.
news.summary: Mexico City-based industrial real estate company, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: VESTA; NYSE: VTMX), disclosed its Q4 2024 outcomes, ending on December 31. The financial data presented adheres to International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), differing from U.S. GAAP. It is essential to review this information alongside.

news.headline: CAPREIT increases monthly distribution to $0.12916 per Unit ($1.55 annually) for February 2025. Payable on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: Today, in Toronto, Canadian Apartment Properties Real Estate Investment Trust, known as CAPREIT, disclosed its monthly distribution for February 2025. They have declared a payment of $0.12916 per Unit, equating to $1.55 annually. The distribution is scheduled to be paid out on March 17, 2025, to Unitholders recorded at the end of business on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Southstone diversifies with Botswana uranium acquisition, advancing Oena Diamond Mine. Acquiring Afrium holding 3 uranium Prospecting Licenses, expanding its reach.
news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, on February 18, 2025, Southstone Minerals Limited ("Southstone") (TSXV – SML) has announced the signing of a binding term sheet with Afrium Energy Pte. Ltd. ("Afrium") for the acquisition of all Afrium's securities. Afrium, a private Singapore corporation, owns 100% of Afrium Energy Botswana (Pty) Ltd. and Copper Falcon Botswana (Pty) Ltd., which collectively possess three uranium Prospecting Licenses in Botswana's Republic, known as the Lekobolo Project. This transaction, along with the Concurrent Equity Financing, marks a significant move for Southstone towards expanding its portfolio.

news.headline: European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (ERES) declares €0.005 per Unit monthly distribution, equivalent to €0.06 per Unit annualized. Payable to Unitholders on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: ERE.UN, “ERES”) has declared a monthly cash distribution for February 2025 at €0.005 per Unit and Class B LP Unit, totaling €0.06 per Unit annually. This distribution is set to be paid on March 17, 2025, to Unitholders of record on February 28, 2025. The trustees of ERES are pleased to announce this upcoming payment.

news.headline: AdvisorVault unites Microsoft 365 with their 17a-4 D3P service to assist clients in complying with FINRA rule 17a-4.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in New York, AdvisorVault recognized issues faced by customers in adhering to FINRA rule 17a-4 regarding electronic records retention. To address this, they transitioned to being a Microsoft 365 Cloud Service Provider (365 CSP). This move allowed them to combine all Microsoft 365 features with their 17a-4 D3P service. By doing so, firms now have improved capabilities in meeting regulatory requirements efficiently.

news.headline: CVR Partners reports Q4 2024 net income of $18 million, EBITDA of $50 million on net sales of $140 million, compared to Q4 2023.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, on February 18, 2025, CVR Partners, LP, a company trading under the ticker symbol NYSE: UAN, disclosed their financial results. The manufacturer of ammonia and urea ammonium nitrate (“UAN”) solution fertilizer products reported a net income of $18 million, equivalent to $1.73 per common unit, and EBITDA of $50 million from net sales totaling $140 million for the fourth quarter of 2024. In comparison, the same period in 2023 saw a net income of $10 million, or 94 cents per common unit, and EBITDA of $38 million from net sales of $142 million.

news.headline: CVR Energy's Q4, 2024 financial results: $28M net income, 13 cents per share loss, $40M net income, 122M EBITDA, 67M adjusted EBITDA.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, on February 18, 2025, CVR Energy, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. The net income attributable to CVR Energy stockholders for this period was reported at $28 million, translating to 28 cents per diluted share. This marks a decrease from the fourth quarter of 2023, which saw net income at $91 million, or 91 cents per diluted share. The adjusted loss per diluted share for Q4 2024 was 13 cents, contrasting with adjusted earnings of 65 cents per diluted share in Q4 2023. The total net income for the last quarter of 2024 amounted to $40 million, a decrease from the $97 million reported in the same period in 2023. EBITDA for Q4 2024 was noted at $122 million, down from $204 million in Q4 2023. Additionally, adjusted EBITDA for the fourth quarter of 2024 saw a decrease to $67 million, compared to the previous year's $170 million.

news.headline: Find out the Fed's stance on Trump's tariffs and inflation soon. Stay tuned for updates.
Cadence Design Systems Q4 earnings beat expectations, with $1.36 billion revenue and $1.88 EPS. Shares drop due to soft guidance.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc (NASDAQ:CDNS) released their Q4 financial results with revenue hitting $1.36 billion, slightly exceeding the estimated $1.35 billion. Adjusted EPS stood at $1.88, surpassing the projected $1.82. The company experienced a 27% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year. They closed the quarter with a record backlog of $6.8 billion and current remaining performance obligations totaling $3.4 billion. Additionally, Cadence reported holding $2.64 billion in cash. For a comprehensive analysis, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: West Red Lake plans $12.3M bought deal public offering of charity flow-through units.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3% in the month of September, indicating a decrease of 0.5% compared to the previous month. The number of employed individuals has also increased by 250,000, reaching a total of 30.5 million people actively working. Additionally, the average hourly wage has risen by 2.7% year-on-year, now standing at $25.60. These promising figures suggest a positive trend in the country's labor market, with more people finding jobs and experiencing growth in their wages.

news.headline: 3 reasons for stablecoin growth worldwide. Will US adopt under Trump? Emerging markets see rise in stablecoin use despite lacking regulations & banking infrastructure.
news.summary: The adoption of stablecoins in developing nations is rapidly increasing, despite the lack of supportive cryptocurrency regulations and traditional banking services. The use of stablecoins has surged in these markets, emphasizing their popularity and functionality. The United States may need to work towards following this trend to stay aligned with the global shift towards digital currencies.

news.headline: Penguin Solutions stock sees an increase in IBD RS Rating to 79, indicating improving technical performance.
news.summary: Penguin Solutions has experienced an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, reaching a score of 79, indicating improving technical performance. This spike raises the question of whether this positive trend will be sustained in the future.

news.headline: Incyte stock's relative strength rating increases to 71, reflecting improved price performance. (Total characters: 86)
news.summary: Incyte has demonstrated a positive trend in its price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating to 71. This improvement indicates solid momentum in the stock's performance.

news.headline: Meta stock fell, ending Facebook parent's 20-day win streak. Closed Tuesday trading lower, impacting record trend.
news.summary: The stock of Meta, the parent company of Facebook, experienced a decline in Tuesday's trading session, marking the end of an unprecedented 20-day streak of consecutive gains. This halt in momentum resulted in Meta Stock closing lower than previous days. The news was reported by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the significance of this market shift.

news.headline: Recursion Pharmaceuticals stock reaches elite RS rating of over 90, as reported on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Recursion Pharmaceuticals experiences a surge in its Relative Strength Rating, reaching a prestigious level of 90 or higher. This notable achievement underscores the company's market performance and potential for growth.

news.headline: Occidental Petroleum, Warren Buffett's favorite energy stock, sees surprise profit growth alongside debt reduction focus.
news.summary: In recent quarters, Occidental Petroleum has focused on reducing its debt. The energy company, favored by Warren Buffett, recently reported a surprise growth in profits while maintaining its focus on reducing debt.

news.headline: Shift4 acquired Global Blue, leading to share drop due to weak 2025 outlook with revenue and EBITDA below expectations. Q4 earnings exceeded estimates.
news.summary: Shift4's stock price experienced a drop following the release of its full-year 2025 revenue and EBITDA guidance, which fell short of projections. However, Q4 earnings for Shift4 exceeded expectations. The announcement of the acquisition of Global Blue added to the news, causing a decrease in share value due to the weak outlook for 2025.

news.headline: Arista beats earnings estimates with revenue outlook slightly above views amid AI-driven data center upgrades.
news.summary: Arista's revenue guidance for the March quarter exceeded expectations, suggesting a positive outlook as investors reconsider investments in AI-driven data center upgrades. Earnings for Arista also surpassed estimates, reflecting strong performance in the market.

news.headline: Cadence Design Systems outperformed in Q4, but disappointed with 2025 guidance, leading to CDNS stock decline.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems exceeded expectations for Q4 but disappointed with its 2025 forecast, causing CDNS stock to decline. The company's stock saw a drop due to weaker guidance for the year 2025.

news.headline: Occidental Petroleum Q4 results: EPS beats at 80 cents, revenue misses at $6.83 billion, down from $7.52 billion. Shares slide.
news.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corp. (NYSE:OXY) released its fourth-quarter financial results after Tuesday's market close. The company reported earnings of 80 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 70 cents and up from 74 cents per share in the previous year. Quarterly revenue totaled $6.83 billion, falling short of the expected $7.05 billion and down from $7.52 billion in the same quarter last year. This information was disclosed alongside news of US and Russian officials commencing peace talks regarding Ukraine. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump: Probably will meet with Putin before end of month.
Bumble earnings report featured on Bloomberg's Closing Bell.
Trump on Venezuela oil exports via Chevron: Maybe not. $CVX
